description: Income tracking with two linked entities: income sources (clients/employers with legal details for invoicing) and income records (individual payments linked to a source with amount, date, and description).

subDeliverables.title: Income sources CRUD
subDeliverables.description: Full CRUD for income sources with fields: source name (required), initials, legal name, legal address, legal city/state/zip, and legal ID for invoice generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create income source with source name (required)
Legal fields (name, address, city/state/zip, ID) are optional
Sources listed alphabetically by source name

subDeliverables.title: Income records form
subDeliverables.description: Form for recording income payments with fields: amount (required), income source (select), date, and description.
acceptanceCriteria: Income source selectable from existing sources

subDeliverables.title: Add income page
subDeliverables.description: Full-page add income view integrating the IncomeForm component with navigation and success handling.

subDeliverables.title: Income list page with source management
subDeliverables.description: Combined page showing income records list and income source management in sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Income records displayed in list format
Income sources manageable from same page
